name: My Agent
description: A production agent with full A2A capabilities, signature verification, and identity binding

skills.name: Analyze Data
skills.description: Performs statistical analysis on structured datasets
examples: Analyze the sales data for Q4
Run a regression on the customer churn dataset
Show me the correlation between price and demand

parameters.name: analysisType
parameters.description: Type of analysis: regression, correlation, summary, anomaly

parameters.name: confidence
parameters.description: Confidence level for statistical tests (0.0 to 1.0)

skills.name: Generate Report
skills.description: Creates formatted reports from analysis results
examples: Generate a report of last month's metrics

parameters.name: includeCharts
parameters.description: Whether to include chart descriptions in the report
